title: Google I/O 2026: 3 things you need to know
summary: Google announced Gemini Spark, an AI assistant that integrates directly into Gmail, Drive, and Calendar with pre-loaded context. It is positioned as ready to use out of the box, targeting everyday users in contrast to competitors like Claude Cowork and Codex.
